pre_call_brief.objective: Qualify and convert the roofing opportunity while urgency is high.
pre_call_brief.opener: Large roof and closeability make this worth a roof-first conversation even before full storm evidence is loaded.
proof_points: Large roof and closeability make this worth a roof-first conversation even before full storm evidence is loaded.
Large roof and closeability make this worth a roof-first conversation even before full storm evidence is loaded.

objection_map.handling_angle: Position as a fast second-look inspection with trigger-backed urgency and no-friction next step.
Use storm/flood/permit evidence to frame why delay increases risk and offer a narrow booking window.
Focus first on inspection findings and loss prevention before full replacement economics.

live_assist.recommended_talk_track: Large roof and closeability make this worth a roof-first conversation even before full storm evidence is loaded.
stop_conditions: lead outcome becomes won or lost
operator status becomes closed or skip
prospect gives explicit do-not-contact or hard no
policy/compliance flags require manual review before send
